messages.author: Avery Liu
messages.body: Morning all. Pushed retriever-xl v1.2 to staging — eval looks 12% better on loss.

messages.author: Marcus Reed
messages.body: Nice. We'll watch p95 in prod once it promotes. I'll pin the dashboard for the day.

messages.author: Sarah Chen
messages.body: Heads up — anomaly hitting /api/agents. p95 just jumped to 1.24s.

messages.author: Marcus Reed
messages.body: Looking. Looks correlated with planner-alpha cache flush at 14:20.

messages.author: BX-AI
messages.body: I correlated the p95 spike with the planner-alpha cache flush. 3 mitigations attached.

messages.author: M. Rigsby
messages.body: Thanks BX-AI. Going with mitigation 2 — least invasive.

messages.author: Avery Liu
messages.body: Latency back to baseline. Closing the alert.

messages.author: Sarah Chen
messages.body: cc @mrigsby — can you take the writeup?
